Hardware Component File

4GRIP ECU_xJI_xJF_V1

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference 4GRIP_ECU_xJI_xJF_V1_20191112T171342.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 748
Receive ID 768
Functional Addr 1E
Functional Name 4WD

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "97",
    "supplier": "JABIL CIRCUIT INC",
    "soft": "SW01.06",
    "version": "SW01.06"
  }
]

Associated Devices

Supply Voltage ID:
Vehicle CAN ID:
ECM Invalid data ID:
Lost Communication with VDC on Vehicle CAN ID:

IGN wire issue ID:

Wheels ID:
ASR malfunction ID:
Temperature sensor ID:

fGRIP ECU SW takeover EPU activation ID:
fGRIP ECU SW takeover BrakingInRegulation ID:

ECUDocs

The industry standard for automotive hardware ECU documentation. Providing precise wiring diagrams and pinout specifications for technicians and enthusiasts worldwide.

HQ

London, United Kingdom

  • ECU Database
